seoTitle: Garvoc vs Gatum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Garvoc and Gatum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Garvoc and Gatum.
heading: Garvoc vs Gatum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Garvoc, Victoria and Gatum, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Garvoc and Gatum have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Garvoc or Gatum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Garvoc has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Gatum scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Garvoc scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Gatum scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Garvoc or Gatum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Garvoc has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
